## Summary
- Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Workflow Checklist
- [ ] Plan created before implementation.
- [ ] Relevant checks run (for example: `npm run lint`, `npm run build`, and/or `npm run test:integration`).
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable.
- [ ] Security considerations reviewed (inputs, auth, secrets, CORS/HTTPS impact).
- [ ] **Docs touched?** If this PR changes release or deploy behavior, I updated `docs/ai/MEMORY.md` and/or `docs/ai/BACKLOG.md`.

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented and tested.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
- [ ] Security review completed.
- [ ] Performance impact assessed.
- [ ] Deployment verified in staging.

## Testing
- List the commands you ran and the results.

## Notes
- Add follow-ups, risks, or rollout/rollback notes if needed.
